nasb.text: Then I began to weep greatly because no one was found worthy to open the book or to look into it;

esv.text: and I began to weep loudly because no one was found worthy to open the scroll or to look into it.

cnv.text: 因為沒有人配展開觀看書卷，我就大哭。

ccb.text: 我见无人有资格揭开并阅读那卷书，便放声大哭。

csbs.text: 于是我就大哭，因为找不到配打开或阅读那书卷的。
